problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Reservoir computing with physical substrate may resolve Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
